Login.title: Sign In to My Local Commerce

ForgotPassword.title: Recover Password
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If the email is registered, you will receive a reset link shortly.

Landing.title: Everything your local business needs to
Landing.subtitle: Manage reservations, staff, inventory, customers, and everything you need in a single platform. Synchronize businesses in your area and customers in a community that revolutionizes the market.

features.reservationsDesc: Accept bookings 24/7. Auto-reminders reduce no-shows. Easy calendar management for your staff.
features.loyaltyDesc: Turn first-time visitors into regulars. Track history, preferences, and reward loyalty automatically.
features.analyticsDesc: Understand your revenue, busy hours, and top services at a glance without being a data expert.

Contact.title: Do you need some
Contact.description: Share your questions with us and a member of our team will get in touch soon. No pressure, no commitment.
Contact.methodLabel: How would you prefer us to contact you?

Map.title: Local Businesses
Map.subtitle: Discover the businesses registered on our platform and find them on the map.
Map.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, street, or service...

AuthError.title: Authentication Error
AuthError.description: We couldn't validate the link code. This usually happens if the link has expired, has already been used, or if you are using a different browser than the one you started the process in.
AuthError.step2: Make sure to use the same browser (don't switch between mobile and computer).
AuthError.step3: Do not click the same link twice.

Team.title: Team
Team.subtitle: Manage your business professionals, their skills, and schedules.
Team.noEmployeesDesc: Start by inviting your team members to manage the business.
Team.name: Name

servicesTab.title: Assigned Services
servicesTab.subtitle: Define which services this employee can perform and adjust prices or duration if needed.

shiftsTab.title: Shift Management
shiftsTab.subtitle: Plan work hours and breaks.
shiftsTab.errorTime: End time must be after start time

BusinessSettings.hoursSubtitle: Define when your business is open to the public.

BusinessExceptions.title: Special Days & Holidays
BusinessExceptions.subtitle: Configure exceptions for specific dates, like holidays or vacations.
BusinessExceptions.deleteConfirm: Delete this exception and revert to standard hours?

CalendarModal.title: Visual Schedule
CalendarModal.help: This calendar combines your weekly schedule with special closures you've configured by date.
